because.text: Accepted after independent adversarial verification: 30/30 sigma eval vectors re-run; float-ts and filename-tamper regressions agree (exit 1/1); ski differential on expect-exhausted / wrong-expect / expect-unres gives identical verdicts in both implementations; a deliberately false verdict claim is caught by both with the same mismatch warning. Third independent implementation of Book I v0.5 evaluation. Driven end-to-end via codex exec by the maintainer - zero human relay.

subject.note: PR #4: impl-go v0.2, native Go Sigma-GLYPH evaluator
